message:
Fix security, persistence, compliance modal, token cache, MCP errors (#4767)

- #4735: Compliance checks card now opens checks-specific modal via
  drillToCompliance() instead of reusing the Security Issues modal
- #4749: Persistence watcher uses context.Background() instead of
  request-scoped context so it survives after HTTP response completes
- #4750: All persistence mutation endpoints now require admin role,
  matching the pattern used by workload handlers
- #4751: Frontend logout() now calls POST /auth/logout to revoke
  the server-side JWT before clearing client state
- #4753: MCP error responses use sanitized user-friendly messages;
  raw backend details are only logged server-side
- #4756: json.Unmarshal errors for card position in sqlite.go are
  now logged instead of silently ignored
- #4758: Multi-cluster handlers track per-cluster failures via
  clusterErrorTracker and include partial/clusterErrors in response
- #4759: Revoked token cache enforces max size (10K entries) and
  periodic cleanup of zero-time backfilled entries to prevent
  unbounded memory growth

Fixes #4735, #4749, #4750, #4751, #4753, #4756, #4758, #4759

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -957,7 +957,7 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Post("/kagenti-provider/tools/call", kagentiProviderHandler.CallTool)
 
 	// Console persistence routes (CRD-based state management)
-	persistenceHandler := handlers.NewConsolePersistenceHandlers(s.persistenceStore, s.k8sClient, s.hub)
+	persistenceHandler := handlers.NewConsolePersistenceHandlers(s.persistenceStore, s.k8sClient, s.hub, s.store)
 	api.Get("/persistence/config", persistenceHandler.GetConfig)
 	api.Put("/persistence/config", persistenceHandler.UpdateConfig)
 	api.Get("/persistence/status", persistenceHandler.GetStatus)
